title: Nursery Rhyme. CCXII. Riddles.
content:
[Isabel.]

        Congeal'd water and Cain's brother,
        That was my lover's name, and no other.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCXII. Riddles."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
